retrieved_result: About REPu We Empower Schools REPu partners with schools across the US to enable them to bring their community together. A closely connected community of students, parents, teachers, coaches, fans, local businesses and organizations all unified through a simple digital platform enhancing the school’s presence
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page describes a school community platform and is unrelated to easy DIY room decoration ideas.
